title: SocGen brings MiCA-compliant USDCV dollar stablecoin to MetaMask
message_html: SocGen brings MiCA-compliant USDCV dollar stablecoin to MetaMask ...
snippet: Societe Generale-FORGE said MetaMask will add its MiCA-compliant USDCV stablecoin, extending distribution for one of Europe’s bank-backed digital dollars.
